--------------------------------------------------------
--  DDL for View HOLD_ALLOT_REPORTS
--------------------------------------------------------

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE EDITIONABLE VIEW "MS9ABA"."HOLD_ALLOT_REPORTS" ("SECURITY_CODE", "IC_PASSPORT", "ISIN_CODE", "PROCESS_DATE", "APPLICATION_TYPE", "AMOUNT", "SB_NATION", "IS_HLD_ALT", "NATIONALITY", "NATION_CITY") AS
SELECT  aba0231_sb_security_code AS security_code,
aba0223_sb_ic_passport AS passport,
aba0231_sb_isin_code AS isin_code,
TO_CHAR (TO_DATE (aba0230_sb_process_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYYMM') AS process_Date,
aba0230_sb_hld_type  AS application_type,
aba0231_sb_hld_amt AS amount,aba0223_sb_cd_nation as nation,'HOLDING' as is_hld_alt,
aba0218_sb_description AS nationality,
aba0218_sb_cd_nation_cty AS nation_city
FROM aba0231_sb_hld_info_dt INNER JOIN aba0230_sb_hld_info
ON aba0231_sb_hld_info_id = aba0230_sb_hld_info_id
INNER JOIN aba0223_sb_applicant
ON aba0231_sb_applicant_id = aba0223_sb_applicant_id
LEFT JOIN aba0218_sb_cd_nation_cty on aba0223_sb_cd_nation_cty = aba0218_sb_cd_nation_cty

UNION all
SELECT  C.ABA0224_SB_SECURITY_CODE AS security_code,
D.aba0223_sb_ic_passport AS passport,
C.aba0224_sb_isin_code AS isin_code,
TO_CHAR (E.aba0101_sb_result_load_date, 'YYYYMM') AS process_Date,
(case when aba0224_sb_cd_file_type = 'AP1'
THEN 'CAS'
ELSE 'SRS' END)
AS application_type,
A.aba0232_sb_processed_amt AS amount ,aba0223_sb_cd_nation as nation,'ALLOTMENT' as is_hld_alt,
aba0218_sb_description AS nationality,
aba0218_sb_cd_nation_cty AS nation_city
FROM aba0232_sb_allotment_result A,
aba0225_sb_subscript_dt B,
aba0224_sb_subscript C,
aba0223_sb_applicant D,
aba0101_sb_security_master E,
aba0214_sb_cd_file_type F,
aba0218_sb_cd_nation_cty G
WHERE
A.aba0232_sb_processed_amt>0
and A.aba0232_sb_sub_detail_id = B.aba0225_sb_sub_detail_id
AND B.aba0225_sb_sub_id = C.aba0224_sb_sub_id
AND B.aba0225_sb_applicant_id = D.aba0223_sb_applicant_id
AND C.aba0224_sb_security_code = E.aba0101_sb_security_code
AND C.aba0224_sb_isin_code = E.aba0101_sb_isin_code
AND C.aba0224_sb_cd_file_type = F.aba0214_sb_cd_file_type
AND D.aba0223_sb_cd_nation_cty = G.aba0218_sb_cd_nation_cty
	AND TO_CHAR (E.aba0101_sb_result_load_date, 'YYYYMMDD') in
(SELECT MAX(TO_CHAR(aba0101_sb_result_load_date,'YYYYMMDD')) from aba0101_sb_security_master
GROUP BY TRUNC(aba0101_sb_result_load_date, 'MM'))
;
--------------------------------------------------------
--  DDL for View VW_ERF_001
--------------------------------------------------------

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE EDITIONABLE VIEW "MS9ABA"."VW_ERF_001" ("TRADE_DATE", "VALUE_DATE", "SPECIFIC_ISSUE", "ALLOTTED", "PD", "1ST_LEG_PROCEEDS_S", "MATURITY", "GENERAL_COLLATERAL", "NOMINAL_GC", "REPO_FEE", "STATUS") AS
SELECT
ABA0605_RECEIVED_DT,
(select ABA0017_REPOT1_DATE from MS9ABA.ABA0017_FINAL_DAILY_PRICE@MNET where ABA0017_SECURITY_CODE = ABA0605_SECURITY_CODE and ABA0017_ISSUE_NO = 1 and to_char(ABA0017_SUBMISSION_DATE, 'dd/mm/yyyy')=to_char(ABA0605_RECEIVED_DT, 'dd/mm/yyyy')),
ABA0605_SECURITY_CODE,
ABA0605_AMT_ALLOTTED,
ABA0605_BANK_CODE,
(ABA0605_DIRTY_PRICE * ABA0605_AMT_ALLOTTED/ 100),
(select ABA0017_REPOT2_DATE from MS9ABA.ABA0017_FINAL_DAILY_PRICE@MNET where ABA0017_SECURITY_CODE = ABA0605_SECURITY_CODE and ABA0017_ISSUE_NO = 1 and to_char(ABA0017_SUBMISSION_DATE, 'dd/mm/yyyy')=to_char(ABA0605_RECEIVED_DT, 'dd/mm/yyyy')),
ABA0605_EXG_SEC_CODE,
ABA0605_EXG_NOMINAL_AMT,
ABA0605_REPO_FEE,
ABA0605_STATUS_FLAG
FROM MS9ABA.ABA0605_TRADE_DETAILS@MNET
;
--------------------------------------------------------
--  DDL for View VW_HLD_001
--------------------------------------------------------

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE EDITIONABLE VIEW "MS9ABA"."VW_HLD_001" ("IC_CDP_KEY", "NATION", "CTRY", "BANK", "ISSUE_CD", "HLD_TYPE", "AMT", "PROCESS_DT") AS
SELECT utl_raw.cast_to_varchar2(utl_encode.base64_encode(utl_raw.cast_to_raw(ABA0223_SB_IC_PASSPORT))) AS IC_CDP_Key,
e.ABA0217_SB_DESCRIPTION AS NATION,
c.aba0223_sb_cd_nation_cty AS CTRY,
d.ABA0222_SB_ORG_NAME AS BANK,
b.ABA0231_SB_SECURITY_CODE AS ISSUE_CD,
a.aba0230_sb_hld_type AS HLD_TYPE,
b.ABA0231_SB_HLD_AMT AS AMT,
a.ABA0230_SB_Process_DT AS PROCESS_DT
FROM ABA0230_SB_HLD_INFO a
INNER JOIN ABA0231_SB_HLD_INFO_DT b
ON b.ABA0231_SB_HLD_INFO_ID = a.ABA0230_SB_HLD_INFO_ID
INNER JOIN (select aba0230_sb_org_id, MAX(ABA0230_SB_PROCESS_DT) process_dt from ABA0230_SB_HLD_INFO group by aba0230_sb_org_id) g
on a.aba0230_sb_org_id= g.aba0230_sb_org_id and a.ABA0230_SB_PROCESS_DT= g.PROCESS_DT
INNER JOIN ABA0223_SB_APPLICANT c
ON b.ABA0231_SB_APPLICANT_ID = c.ABA0223_SB_APPLICANT_id
LEFT JOIN aba0222_sb_org d
ON d.aba0222_sb_org_id = a.aba0230_sb_org_id
LEFT JOIN aba0217_sb_cd_nation e
ON c.aba0223_sb_cd_nation = e.aba0217_sb_cd_nation
;

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE EDITIONABLE VIEW "MS9ABA"."VW_QA_REDEM_001" ("IC_CDP_KEY", "NATION", "CTRY", "ISSUE_CD", "RCV_DT", "RCV_TM", "RDM_AMT", "BANK", "STATUS", "APP_TYPE", "RDM_TYPE") AS
SELECT SUBSTR (c.aba0223_sb_ic_passport, -5)
|| SUBSTR (B.ABA0228_SB_CDP_ACCT_NO, -6)
AS IC_CDP_Key,
e.ABA0217_SB_DESCRIPTION AS NATION,
c.aba0223_sb_cd_nation_cty AS CTRY,
b.ABA0228_SB_SECURITY_CODE AS ISSUE_CD,
b.ABA0228_SB_RECEIVED_DT AS RCV_DT,
b.ABA0228_SB_RECEIVED_TIME AS RCV_TM,
b.ABA0228_SB_NOMINAL_AMT AS RDM_AMT,
d.ABA0222_SB_ORG_NAME AS BANK,
b.ABA0228_SB_CD_RECORD_STATUS AS STATUS,
i.aba0214_sb_description AS APP_TYPE,
d.ABA0240_SB_DESCRIPTION AS RDM_TYPE
FROM aba0227_sb_redemption a
INNER JOIN aba0228_sb_redemption_dt b
ON b.aba0228_sb_redem_id = a.aba0227_sb_redem_id
INNER JOIN ABA0223_SB_APPLICANT c
ON b.ABA0228_SB_APPLICANT_ID = c.ABA0223_SB_APPLICANT_id
INNER JOIN ABA0240_SB_CD_SUBMISSION_TYPE d
ON d.ABA0240_SB_CD_SUBMIT_TYPE = b.ABA0228_SB_SUB_METHOD
LEFT JOIN aba0217_sb_cd_nation e
ON c.aba0223_sb_cd_nation = e.aba0217_sb_cd_nation
LEFT JOIN aba0222_sb_org d
ON b.ABA0228_SB_CUST_BANK_CODE = d.aba0222_sb_org_code
LEFT JOIN aba0214_sb_cd_file_type i
ON a.aba0227_sb_cd_file_type = i.aba0214_sb_cd_file_type
ORDER BY IC_CDP_Key, rcv_dt, rcv_tm
;
--------------------------------------------------------
--  DDL for View VW_QA_SUB_001
--------------------------------------------------------

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE EDITIONABLE VIEW "MS9ABA"."VW_QA_SUB_001" ("ISSUE_CD", "IC_CDP_KEY", "AGE", "RECEIVED_DT", "RECEIVED_TM", "SUBMITTED_AMT", "ACCEPTED_AMT", "ALLOTED_AMT", "BANK", "NATIONALITY", "RESIDENCY", "APP_TYPE", "APP_CHANNEL", "ALLOT_STATUS", "ALLOT_FAIL_REASON") AS
SELECT h.aba0224_sb_security_code AS ISSUE_CD,
SUBSTR (c.aba0223_sb_ic_passport, -5)
|| SUBSTR (b.ABA0225_SB_CDP_ACCT_NO, -6)
AS IC_CDP_Key,
CASE
WHEN ABA0223_SB_CD_NATION in ('S','P') and SUBSTR (c.aba0223_sb_ic_passport, 1, 1)='S' and SUBSTR (c.aba0223_sb_ic_passport, 2, 2) >= 68
ThEN
100
- TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR (c.aba0223_sb_ic_passport, 2, 2))
#ERROR!
WHEN ABA0223_SB_CD_NATION in ('S','P') and SUBSTR (c.aba0223_sb_ic_passport, 1, 1)='T'
ThEN
TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YY'))
- TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR (c.aba0223_sb_ic_passport, 2, 2))
ELSE
NULL
END
AS AGE,
b.ABA0225_SB_RECEIVED_DT AS RECEIVED_DT,
b.ABA0225_SB_RECEIVED_TIME AS RECEIVED_TM,
b.ABA0225_SB_NOMINAL_AMT AS SUBMITTED_AMT,
a.ABA0232_SB_ACCEPTED_AMT AS ACCEPTED_AMT,
a.ABA0232_SB_PROCESSED_AMT AS ALLOTED_AMT,
d.ABA0222_SB_ORG_NAME AS BANK,
e.ABA0217_SB_DESCRIPTION AS NATIONALITY,
c.ABA0223_SB_CD_NATION_CTY AS RESIDENCY,
i.aba0214_sb_description AS APP_TYPE,
f.aba0240_sb_description AS APP_CHANNEL,
g.aba0216_sb_description AS ALLOT_STATUS,
j.ABA0220_SB_DESCRIPTION
FROM ABA0225_SB_SUBSCRIPT_DT b
INNER JOIN aba0224_sb_subscript h
ON b.aba0225_sb_sub_id = h.aba0224_sb_sub_id
INNER JOIN ABA0223_SB_APPLICANT c
ON b.ABA0225_SB_APPLICANT_ID = c.ABA0223_SB_APPLICANT_ID
LEFT JOIN ABA0232_SB_ALLOTMENT_RESULT a
ON b.ABA0225_SB_SUB_DETAIL_ID = a.ABA0232_SB_SUB_DETAIL_ID
LEFT JOIN ABA0220_SB_CD_RECORD_ERR_DESC j
ON a.ABA0232_SB_CD_RECORD_ERR_DESC =
j.ABA0220_SB_CD_RECORD_ERR_DESC
LEFT JOIN aba0222_sb_org d
ON b.ABA0225_SB_CUST_BANK_CODE = d.aba0222_sb_org_code
LEFT JOIN aba0217_sb_cd_nation e
ON c.ABA0223_SB_CD_NATION = e.aba0217_sb_cd_nation
LEFT JOIN aba0240_sb_cd_submission_type f
ON b.aba0225_sb_sub_method = f.aba0240_sb_cd_submit_type
LEFT JOIN aba0216_sb_cd_record_status g
ON g.aba0216_sb_cd_record_status = a.aba0232_sb_cd_record_status
LEFT JOIN aba0214_sb_cd_file_type i
ON h.aba0224_sb_cd_file_type = i.aba0214_sb_cd_file_type
ORDER BY ISSUE_CD, received_dt, received_tm
;

LEFT JOIN aba0222_sb_org d

--  DDL for View VW_SUB_002
--------------------------------------------------------

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE EDITIONABLE VIEW "MS9ABA"."VW_SUB_002" ("ISSUE_CD", "IC_CDP_KEY", "RECEIVED_DT", "RECEIVED_TM", "SUBMITTED_AMT", "BANK", "NATIONALITY", "RESIDENCY", "APP_TYPE", "APP_CHANNEL") AS
SELECT h.aba0224_sb_security_code AS ISSUE_CD,
utl_raw.cast_to_varchar2(utl_encode.base64_encode(utl_raw.cast_to_raw(ABA0223_SB_IC_PASSPORT))) AS IC_CDP_Key,
b.ABA0225_SB_RECEIVED_DT AS RECEIVED_DT,
b.ABA0225_SB_RECEIVED_TIME AS RECEIVED_TM,
b.ABA0225_SB_NOMINAL_AMT AS SUBMITTED_AMT,
d.ABA0222_SB_ORG_NAME AS BANK,
e.ABA0217_SB_DESCRIPTION AS NATIONALITY,
c.ABA0223_SB_CD_NATION_CTY AS RESIDENCY,
i.aba0214_sb_description AS APP_TYPE,
f.aba0240_sb_description AS APP_CHANNEL
FROM aba0224_sb_subscript h
INNER JOIN ABA0225_SB_SUBSCRIPT_DT b
ON h.aba0224_sb_sub_id = b.aba0225_sb_sub_id
INNER JOIN ABA0223_SB_APPLICANT c
ON b.ABA0225_SB_APPLICANT_ID = c.ABA0223_SB_APPLICANT_ID
LEFT JOIN aba0222_sb_org d
ON b.ABA0225_SB_CUST_BANK_CODE = d.aba0222_sb_org_code
LEFT JOIN aba0217_sb_cd_nation e
ON c.ABA0223_SB_CD_NATION = e.aba0217_sb_cd_nation
LEFT JOIN aba0240_sb_cd_submission_type f
ON b.aba0225_sb_sub_method = f.aba0240_sb_cd_submit_type
LEFT JOIN aba0214_sb_cd_file_type i
ON h.aba0224_sb_cd_file_type = i.aba0214_sb_cd_file_type
ORDER BY ISSUE_CD, received_dt, received_tm
;

/
--------------------------------------------------------
--  DDL for Procedure ERF_UPDATE_DUR_RATES
--------------------------------------------------------
set define off;

CREATE OR REPLACE EDITIONABLE PROCEDURE "MS9ABA"."ERF_UPDATE_DUR_RATES"
(V_REF_NO IN AQA0112_DUR_RATE.AQA0112_REF_NO%TYPE,
V_LOW_DUR IN AQA0112_DUR_RATE.AQA0112_LOW_DURATION%TYPE,
V_HIGH_DUR IN AQA0112_DUR_RATE.AQA0112_HIGH_DURATION%TYPE,
V_REPO_RATE IN AQA0112_DUR_RATE.AQA0112_REPO_RATE%TYPE)
IS
v_cnt NUMBER;
BEGIN
	select count(*) into v_cnt from ms9aba.AQA0112_DUR_RATE where to_char(AQA0112_DATE_CHANGE,'ddmmyyyy') = to_char(sysdate,'ddmmyyyy') AND AQA0112_REF_NO = V_REF_NO;
	if v_cnt > 0
	then
	UPDATE MS9ABA.AQA0112_DUR_RATE SET AQA0112_REF_NO=V_REF_NO, AQA0112_LOW_DURATION=V_LOW_DUR, AQA0112_HIGH_DURATION=V_HIGH_DUR, AQA0112_REPO_RATE=V_REPO_RATE
	WHERE to_char(AQA0112_DATE_CHANGE,'ddmmyyyy') = to_char(sysdate,'ddmmyyyy') AND AQA0112_REF_NO = V_REF_NO;
	else
	INSERT INTO MS9ABA.AQA0112_DUR_RATE (AQA0112_REF_NO, AQA0112_LOW_DURATION, AQA0112_HIGH_DURATION, AQA0112_REPO_RATE, AQA0112_DATE_CHANGE) VALUES
	(V_REF_NO, V_LOW_DUR, V_HIGH_DUR, V_REPO_RATE, sysdate);
	end if;
	DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(v_cnt);
END ERF_UPDATE_DUR_RATES;

CREATE OR REPLACE EDITIONABLE PROCEDURE "MS9ABA"."TEST" is
cursor c_test is
select aba0001_security_code, aba0001_issue_no from ms9aba.aqa0001_security_master;
secCode aqa0001_security_master.ABA0001_SECURITY_CODE%TYPE;
issueNo aqa0001_security_master.ABA0001_ISSUE_NO%TYPE;
BEGIN
	open c_test;
	loop
	fetch c_test into seccode,issueNo;
	exit when c_test%NOTFOUND;
	end loop;
	close c_test;
end test;

--------------------------------------------------------
--  DDL for Function MLAPERIODPRICE
--------------------------------------------------------

CREATE OR REPLACE EDITIONABLE FUNCTION "MS9ABA"."MLAPERIODPRICE" (issueCode IN ABA0001_SECURITY_MASTER.ABA0001_SECURITY_CODE%TYPE, periodDate IN ABA0017_FINAL_DAILY_PRICE.ABA0017_SUBMISSION_DATE%TYPE) RETURN ABA0017_FINAL_DAILY_PRICE.ABA0017_MLA_PRICE%TYPE IS price NUMBER(7,4); BEGIN SELECT	NVL(ABA0017_MLA_PRICE, 0) INTO price FROM	ABA0017_FINAL_DAILY_PRICE WHERE	ABA0017_SECURITY_CODE = issueCode	AND ABA0017_SUBMISSION_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(ABA0017_SUBMISSION_DATE)	FROM ABA0017_FINAL_DAILY_PRICE	WHERE ABA0017_SUBMISSION_DATE < (periodDate - 14)	AND ABA0017_SUBMISSION_DATE >= (periodDate - 21)	AND TO_CHAR(ABA0017_SUBMISSION_DATE, 'D') NOT IN (1, 7)	AND ABA0017_SUBMISSION_DATE NOT IN (SELECT ABA0019_DATE	FROM ABA0019_PUBLIC_HOLIDAY	WHERE ABA0019_COUNTRY = 'SG')); RETURN price; End;

columns.name: ABA0001_SECURITY_CODE
columns.explanation: stores the unique security identifier (e.g., NZ17100A)

columns.name: ABA0001_ISSUE_TYPE
columns.explanation: stores the type of issue (e.g., 'B' for Bond)

columns.name: ABA0001_TENDER_DATE
columns.explanation: stores the date of the auction/tender

columns.name: ABA0001_ISSUE_SIZE
columns.explanation: stores the total size of the issuance

columns.name: ABA0001_QTY_APPLIED
columns.explanation: stores the total quantity applied for in the auction

columns.name: ABA0001_AVE_YIELD
columns.explanation: stores the average yield determined by the auction

columns.name: ABA0001_CUTOFF_YIELD
columns.explanation: stores the cut-off yield determined by the auction

columns.name: ABA0001_MATURITY_DATE
columns.explanation: stores the date the bond matures

columns.name: ABA0001_PERCENT_COY
columns.explanation: stores the percentage allotted at cut-off yield

columns.name: ABA0001_RESULT_LOAD_DATE
columns.explanation: stores the date results were loaded

columns.name: ABA0001_LAST_INT_DATE
columns.explanation: stores the last interest payment date

columns.name: ABA0001_NEXT_INT_DATE
columns.explanation: stores the next interest payment date

columns.name: ABA0001_ACCRUED_INT_DAYS
columns.explanation: stores the number of days for accrued interest

columns.name: ABA0001_INT_DATE1
columns.explanation: stores the first semi-annual interest date

columns.name: ABA0001_INT_DATE2
columns.explanation: stores the second semi-annual interest date

columns.name: ABA0001_INT_PAID_IND
columns.explanation: indicates if interest has been paid

columns.name: ABA0001_ETENDER_IND
columns.explanation: indicates if it is an e-tender

columns.name: ABA0001_MAS_APPLIED
columns.explanation: stores the amount applied by MAS

columns.name: ABA0001_MAS_ALLOTTED
columns.explanation: stores the amount allotted to MAS

columns.name: ABA0006_BANK_ACC_CODE
columns.explanation: stores the bank code the file is destined for

columns.name: ABA0006_LINE_NO
columns.explanation: stores the line sequence number in the file

columns.name: ABA0006_LINE_CONTENT
columns.explanation: stores the actual text content of the result file (Header/Footer/Detail)
sampleValues: Credit Suisse First Boston                       ACCOUNT NO: 7481
ISSUE:BY00003C Auction test round 8 MMD tbill
WE ARE PLEASED TO INFORM YOU THAT YOUR TENDER(S)/APPLICATION(S)
FOR GOVERNMENT SECURITIES HAS/HAVE BEEN ACCEPTED AS FOLLOWS:-

columns.name: ABA0007_NAME_OF_APPLN
sampleValues: OOI MIN SU @ ANG MIN SU

columns.name: ABA0008_ACTION
columns.explanation: stores the detailed action text (e.g., "Started to release result")

columns.name: ABA0212_SB_REPORT_TYPE
columns.explanation: stores the report type (e.g., 'O' for Online, 'B' for Batch)

columns.name: ABA0213_SB_REPORT_FILE_ID
columns.explanation: generates a unique ID for the file

columns.name: ABA0213_SB_REPORT_ID
columns.explanation: links to the report definition in ABA0212

columns.name: ABA0213_SB_FILE_DESC
columns.explanation: stores a description of the file content
sampleValues: Redemption of Singapore Savings Bonds by Amount
Redemption of Singapore Savings Bonds by Issue
Details of Redemption of Singapore Savings Bonds
Redemption of Singapore Savings Bonds by PD
Redemption of Singapore Savings Bonds by Profile

columns.name: ABA0213_SB_SECURITY_CODE
columns.explanation: links the report to a specific security

columns.name: ABA0217_SB_DESCRIPTION
columns.explanation:
Nationality Desc
S - Singapore Citizen
P - Singapore PR
F - Foreigner

columns.name: ABA0223_SB_APPLICANT_ID
columns.explanation: generates or retrieves the unique Primary Key for the investor

columns.name: ABA0223_SB_IC_PASSPORT
columns.explanation: stores the NRIC or Passport Number

columns.name: ABA0223_SB_NAME_OF_APPLN
columns.explanation: stores the investor's name as provided in the bank file

columns.name: ABA0223_SB_CD_NATION_CTY
columns.explanation: stores the Country of Residence code

columns.name: ABA0223_SB_CREATED_DT
columns.explanation: stores the timestamp when this investor was first seen by the system

columns.name: ABA0223_SB_LAST_MODIFIED_DT
columns.explanation: stores the timestamp of the last update to investor details

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_SUB_ID
columns.explanation: generates a unique Primary Key ID sequence for this specific file upload

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_BATCH_JOB_ID
columns.explanation: links to the specific Autosys batch job instance that triggered this file load

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_ORG_ID
columns.explanation: maps to the Bank ID (from ABA0222_SB_ORG)

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_CD_FILE_TYPE
columns.explanation: stores the application type extracted from the filename (AP1, AP2, or AP3)

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_CD_FILE_STATUS
columns.explanation: set to P (Pending) initially and updates to F (Fail) if file level validation fails

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_CD_FILE_ERROR_DESC
columns.explanation: stores specific file-level error codes (e.g., IFF, ITC) if the header validation fails

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_SECURITY_CODE
columns.explanation: stores the Issue Code parsed from the file header (e.g., GX19010Z)

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_ISIN_CODE
columns.explanation: stores the ISIN code parsed from the file header (e.g., SG12345678)

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_TENDER_DT
columns.explanation: stores the tender date indicated in the file header used for validation against the active issue

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_ISSUE_DESC
columns.explanation: stores the security description parsed from the header

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_PROCESS_DT
columns.explanation: stores the date the file was physically processed by the system

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_RECORD_COUNT
columns.explanation: stores the total number of rows indicated in the file header

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_ACKNOWLEDGED_DT
columns.explanation: stores the timestamp when the acknowledgement file was generated for the bank

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_CREATED_DT
columns.explanation: stores the system timestamp of when this record was inserted

columns.name: ABA0224_SB_LAST_MODIFIED_DT
columns.explanation: stores the timestamp of the last update (e.g., when status changed from P to F)

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_SUB_DETAIL_ID
columns.explanation: generates a unique Primary Key ID for this specific transaction row

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_SUB_ID
columns.explanation: links this record back to the Header table ABA0224

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_APPLICANT_ID
columns.explanation: a Foreign Key linking to the Applicant Master table

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_REFERENCE_NO
columns.explanation: stores an internal running sequence number generated by the system

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_TRANS_REF
columns.explanation: stores the unique transaction reference provided by the bank

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_TRANS_TYPE
columns.explanation: stores the transaction type code (usually 'TE_') from the file

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_RECEIVED_DT
columns.explanation: stores the date the bank received the bid from the customer

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_RECEIVED_TIME
columns.explanation: stores the time the bank received the bid from the customer

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_NOMINAL_AMT
columns.explanation: stores the amount the investor wants to invest

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_COMP_NOCOMP
columns.explanation: stores the competitive indicator (although SSBs are non-competitive, this field exists for compatibility)

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_BID_YIELD_SIGN
columns.explanation: stores the sign (+/-) of the yield if applicable

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_BID_YIELD
columns.explanation: stores the yield value (usually 0 for SSBs)

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_CDP_ACCT_NO
columns.explanation: stores the investor's CDP account number

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_CPFIS_SRS_ACCT_NO
columns.explanation: stores the CPF or SRS account number if the application type is not Cash

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_CUST_BANK_CODE
columns.explanation: stores the settlement bank code (should match the submitting bank for individuals)

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_CUST_BANK_BC
columns.explanation: stores 'C' to indicate this is a Customer (Retail) bid

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_TYPE_OF_APPLN
columns.explanation: stores 'IND' to indicate an Individual applicant

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_SUB_METHOD
columns.explanation: stores the channel used (A=ATM, B=Internet Banking, C=Mobile)

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_ISSUE_DESC
columns.explanation: stores the security description for this specific row

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_FILLER
columns.explanation: stores any padding/filler data from the interface file

columns.name: ABA0225_SB_CD_RECORD_STATUS
columns.explanation: tracks the status of this specific bid (P=Pass, F=Fail)

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_SUB_DT_ERR_ID
columns.explanation: generates a unique Primary Key for this error record

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_SUB_ID
columns.explanation: links the error back to the file header in ABA0224

columns.explanation: preserves the security code from the failed record

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_TRANS_REF
columns.explanation: preserves the bank reference for reconciliation

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_RECEIVED_DT
columns.explanation: preserves the original timestamp from the bank

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_RECEIVED_TIME
columns.explanation: preserves the original timestamp from the bank

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_NOMINAL_AMT
columns.explanation: preserves the original attempted amount for audit

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_IC_PASSPORT
columns.explanation: preserves the NRIC that failed validation

columns.explanation: preserves the applicant name for reporting

columns.explanation: preserves the CDP account number for correction

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_CPFIS_SRS_ACCT_NO
columns.explanation: preserves the CPF/SRS number for correction

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_CD_RECORD_ERR_DESC
columns.explanation: stores the specific error code (e.g., IFF for Invalid File Format)

columns.explanation: stores the exact line number in the source file where the error occurred

columns.name: ABA0226_SB_CREATED_DT

Q:Are the new interest rates out already? So the maximum investment is $100K? Can i apply now?A: The interest rates are published on the website at 430pm.The maximum investment is $50K first month and $100K at any one time.But 50K investment does not guarantee $50K bonds issued.If you are issued for $20K, $30K refundment.    Application officially opens on 1st Sept 6pm.
